access_token.description: Lever OAuth2 access token. Sent as Authorization: Bearer <access_token>. Preferred over api_key when both are present (matches legacy precedence). Never logged.

api_key.description: Lever API key. Sent as the HTTP Basic auth username with a blank password (Lever's documented API-key auth convention). Never logged.

base_url.description: Lever Data API base URL override for tests, proxies, or a sandbox environment (https://api.sandbox.lever.co/v1).

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
